hero.title: Hello, I'm
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer · AI Integrations · ERP Systems
hero.description: Building enterprise ERP platforms with AI-assisted workflows, fiscal API integrations (SAT/CFDI), and scalable backend architectures. Scrum Master & team leader.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Developer building ERP systems, AI integrations and fiscal compliance solutions
about.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
about.p1: Student at Universidad Tecnológica de Torreón with hands-on experience across real production projects — from web and mobile apps to enterprise ERP dashboards with embedded AI copilots.
about.p2: I specialize in connecting intelligent systems and fiscal APIs into production platforms: Claude AI, OpenAI, LangChain, SAT/CFDI 4.0 timbrado, and payment reconciliation with Stripe and OpenPay.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.description: Professional trajectory and highlighted academic projects

items.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Building an enterprise ERP platform with AI copilots for HR management, asset tracking and fiscal compliance workflows
Integrated SAT/CFDI 4.0 timbrado via PAC providers (Finkok, SW Sapien) for automated invoice generation
Engineered LLM agents using Claude AI and OpenAI with RAG pipelines over fiscal and legal document repositories
Implemented payment reconciliation with Stripe and OpenPay; deployed full infrastructure on Docker and cloud

items.title: Junior Software Developer
bullets: Designed and developed e-commerce platforms and landing pages using Next.js, Angular, Node.js and PHP
Integrated payment gateways and secure checkout processes for multiple clients
Built and deployed AI-driven chatbots for customer support and product inquiries
Managed application hosting, deployment and SSL certificates on AWS and DigitalOcean

items.title: Auxiliar Backend Developer / Mobile Developer
bullets: Maintained and enhanced backend services using TypeScript and AdonisJS 5
Developed a React Native + Expo Go MMA mobile app for iOS and Android
Integrated REST APIs, optimized endpoints and ensured cross-platform performance
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on time

items.title: CliniCore — Multi-Platform Clinic Management System
bullets: Led a multi-platform ecosystem: Laravel-based API, AdonisJS microservices, Next.js desktop apps (Tauri), Swift iOS apps and ESP32 sensor integrations
Designed RESTful APIs, patient data modules, appointment scheduling and real-time sensor data processing
Deployed on DigitalOcean with load balancing, SSL and environment variable management

items.title: My Little Assistant — Swift iOS App
bullets: Built an iOS app in Swift consuming REST APIs for task management and personal assistance
Implemented clean UI/UX, asynchronous networking and persistent local data storage

items.title: Infrastructure & Database Management
bullets: Managed AWS and DigitalOcean servers running Rocky Linux and Ubuntu for deployment, security and scaling
Handled MySQL/MariaDB clusters, backups and user access
Implemented Nginx reverse proxies, PM2 process management and SSL certificates

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: Full tech stack — from frontend to AI integrations and fiscal compliance

projects.title: Projects & Experience
projects.description: Production apps, AI integrations, games and hackathon projects

list.title: ABASA ERP Dashboard
list.description: Enterprise ERP with AI copilots, HR asset management, and SAT/CFDI 4.0 fiscal integrations. Built with Astro + TypeScript for production-grade performance.
highlights: ERP dashboard with Astro + TypeScript
AI copilot embedded for HR and asset workflows
SAT/CFDI 4.0 timbrado via PAC (Finkok, SW Sapien)
LLM agents with Claude AI and OpenAI
RAG search over fiscal and legal records
Payment reconciliation with Stripe / OpenPay
Deployed on cloud with Docker

list.title: Who Knows Me Better?
list.description: Full-stack PWA to create personal quizzes and discover who knows you best. Players answer custom questions, the creator gets a live dashboard with score, time, country and global stats.
highlights: PWA with Ionic React + Vite + Service Workers
Express + better-sqlite3 backend with nanoid IDs
Dynamic scoring: time bonus + streak bonus + tiebreakers
Live admin dashboard: geo IP, score distribution, hardest questions
5 pre-built templates (couple, BFF, birthday, work, family)
Bearer-token admin auth with idempotent migrations
63 backend tests with Node test runner — zero extra deps
Web Share API + confetti on perfect scores, EN/ES i18n

list.title: POS Comida — Restaurant Manager
list.description: Private restaurant management platform with an Apple-inspired minimal interface. Real-time table layout, order pipeline, employee dashboards and admin analytics in a single unified system.
highlights: Minimalist Apple-style UI: glass surfaces, soft shadows, generous spacing
Real-time table & floor-plan management with status indicators
Order pipeline: kitchen, bar and waiter views synced via WebSockets
Employee dashboard with shifts, tips and per-role permissions
Admin analytics: revenue, top dishes, hourly heatmaps, ticket avg
Stripe checkout + split bills + printable tickets
Private deployment with role-based auth and audit log

list.title: FieldSales — Flutter Cross-Platform App
list.description: Cross-platform sales app built with Flutter and Dart. Offline-first architecture for field reps with order capture, route planning and Bluetooth thermal printer integration.
highlights: Single Flutter codebase shipping iOS + Android + Web
Offline-first with Hive local DB and background sync
State management with Riverpod 2 + Freezed models
Bluetooth thermal printer integration for ticket printing
Supabase auth + realtime + storage for product images
Custom Material 3 theme aligned with brand guidelines

list.title: Fiscal Data Pipeline — Python ETL
list.description: ETL platform for fiscal and accounting data. Ingests CFDI XML, normalizes records, runs Pandas analytics and exposes a FastAPI for downstream dashboards.
highlights: FastAPI backend with async endpoints and Pydantic schemas
Pandas + NumPy pipelines for fiscal aggregation and reconciliation
Celery + Redis scheduled jobs for nightly XML ingestion
Matplotlib / Plotly charts exported to the ERP frontend
Pytest suite with fixtures and parametrized cases
Docker Compose stack ready for production deploy

list.title: Inventory Service — Java & Spring Boot
list.description: Enterprise inventory microservice in Java with Spring Boot 3. Layered architecture, JPA persistence, JWT auth and OpenAPI docs ready to plug into a service mesh.
highlights: Spring Boot 3 with hexagonal layering (controller / service / repo)
JPA + Hibernate models with PostgreSQL and Flyway migrations
JWT authentication with role-based access control
OpenAPI / Swagger UI auto-generated docs
JUnit 5 + Mockito test suite with >80% coverage
Dockerized for service-mesh deployment (Eureka-ready)

list.title: MedVitrine — Android Sensor Monitor
list.description: Native Android app built in Android Studio that reads IoT sensors inside a medicine display cabinet and keeps real-time control of environmental conditions — temperature, humidity, light and door state — to ensure pharmaceutical compliance.
highlights: Native Android app developed in Android Studio (Kotlin + Java)
Reads temperature, humidity, light and door-state sensors via BLE / MQTT
Real-time live dashboard with MPAndroidChart line graphs
Out-of-range alerts with local push notifications and audible alarms
Room (SQLite) local persistence for offline history and audits
Per-medicine thresholds with regulatory-compliance presets
Material 3 UI with light/dark themes and adaptive layouts
CSV / PDF export of sensor logs for inspections

list.title: PulseLog — Native Swift iOS App
list.description: Native iOS app for health tracking. SwiftUI + Combine, HealthKit integration, CoreData persistence and a Watch companion for real-time heart-rate logging.
highlights: 100% SwiftUI views with Combine for reactive data flows
HealthKit read/write for steps, heart rate and workouts
CoreData stack with iCloud sync via NSPersistentCloudKitContainer
Apple Watch companion app with complications
Animated charts using Swift Charts framework
Localized in EN/ES with adaptive layouts for iPad

list.title: Vendor Portal — Modern Web Platform
list.description: Modern multi-tenant web platform for vendor onboarding and document compliance. React + Vite frontend, Node API and S3-compatible storage with audit-ready trails.
highlights: Multi-tenant React app with route-level code splitting
Tailwind design system with light/dark themes
Node.js + Express API with role-based middleware
S3-compatible document storage with virus scanning
Audit log for every contract / KYC document update
Lighthouse 95+ across performance, a11y and SEO

list.title: NestJS Microservices Platform
list.description: Modular NestJS backend powering multiple ERP modules. GraphQL gateway, REST adapters, RabbitMQ messaging and TypeORM-backed PostgreSQL services.
highlights: Modular NestJS architecture with shared libs (auth, logging)
GraphQL federation gateway for client-facing queries
REST adapters for legacy integrations
RabbitMQ event bus for cross-service messaging
TypeORM with migrations and multi-tenant connection routing
Jest + Supertest e2e test suite, CI on GitHub Actions

list.title: ABASA Marketing — Astro Site
list.description: High-performance marketing site built with Astro. Content collections for blog and case studies, View Transitions, MDX components and zero-JS by default.
highlights: Astro with islands architecture — zero JS on static pages
Content collections + MDX for blog, case studies and docs
View Transitions API for native-like page navigation
Sanity CMS integration for non-technical content updates
Image optimization with Astro Assets + AVIF/WebP
Lighthouse 100 on performance, a11y, best practices, SEO

list.title: DocuMind — AI Document Assistant
list.description: Production RAG assistant for fiscal and legal documents. Claude AI orchestrates retrieval, citations and structured outputs with streaming responses and cost tracking.
highlights: RAG pipeline over fiscal / legal repositories with pgvector
Claude AI + OpenAI multi-provider with model fallback
Streaming responses via SSE with citation markers
Tool-calling agents for invoice lookup and SAT validations
Token + cost tracking per tenant with budget alerts
Eval harness with golden Q&A datasets and regression checks

list.title: SmartTrack
list.description: Intelligent logistics management PWA built at HackMTY 2025 for GateGroup. Gemini AI agents automate airline trolley checklists and inventory validation.
highlights: HackMTY 2025 — GateGroup logistics challenge
PWA with Laravel backend + Angular frontend
Gemini AI agents generating smart checklists from orders
Real-time inventory validation with instant alerts
Gamified platform with achievements and AI micro-coaching
Compliance with airline regulations and client policies

list.title: Clinicore
list.description: Integrated clinical management system with microservices architecture, biometric embedded software, and cross-platform mobile app.
highlights: Full-stack team leadership + Scrum Master
Backend with PHP, Laravel and AdonisJS
Cross-platform mobile app with React
Embedded software reading weight, height, temperature
3 independent microservices with relational + NoSQL DBs
Server management, cybersecurity and DevOps

list.title: PokeUp Trainer
list.description: Progressive Web App for Pokémon trainers built with Ionic React. Features Service Workers for offline support, QR code capture, and team management.
highlights: PWA with Ionic React + Service Workers (offline-first)
QR code Pokémon capture system
Team management — up to 6 Pokémon + box storage
Trainer Profile with role system
Full Pokémon history with stats and characteristics
Native-like mobile experience

list.title: Battle OS
list.description: Educational 2D battle game in Unity where players defeat enemies using real Linux commands. Teaches Operating Systems concepts through interactive gameplay.
highlights: Unity 2D game developed with C# in Visual Studio
Battle system: Linux commands are the attacks
Multiple enemy encounters requiring correct CLI usage
Educational focus on Operating Systems concepts
Team project under Scrum methodology
Universidad Tecnológica de Torreón integrative project

list.title: Encrypted Messaging Game
list.description: Interactive multiplayer game with real-time end-to-end encrypted messaging. AdonisJS backend with Socket.IO and Unity game client.
highlights: Backend with AdonisJS and TypeScript
Real-time communication via Socket.IO
Unity game client integration
End-to-end message encryption
Server administration and DevOps
Secure authentication system

list.title: Integrative Project 2
list.description: Native iOS application for medical appointment management with REST backend integration. Built with Swift and UIKit.
highlights: Native iOS development with Swift
Modern UI with UIKit
REST API backend integration
Registration and authentication system
Appointment and consultation management
Patient information visualization

list.title: Pixel Adventure 2D
list.description: 2D platformer in Unity with C#. Five levels featuring a hearts health system, life-timer mechanic, enemies, and progressively challenging platform sections.
highlights: Unity 2D platformer with C# scripting
5 levels with progressive difficulty
Heart-based health system + life-timer
Enemy AI and platform challenges
Focus on level design and game feel

list.title: Escape Room 3D
list.description: First-person 3D escape room built in Unity. Players solve interactive puzzles, manipulate objects and uncover hidden mechanisms to find the exit before time runs out.
highlights: First-person 3D escape room with full Unity URP rendering
Interactive puzzles: keys, locks, hidden switches and combinations
Smooth animated objects with Animator state machines
Cinemachine cameras for cutscenes and dramatic reveals
Dynamic lighting and baked GI for atmospheric mood
Inventory system + raycast-based object pickup and inspection
Spatial audio with FMOD-style ambient soundscape

list.title: Space War — 2D Shooter
list.description: Classic 2D space shooter built in Unity. Pilot a ship dodging meteors and destroying alien enemies across waves of increasing difficulty with power-ups and boss fights.
highlights: Unity 2D space shooter with C# scripting
Wave-based enemy AI with multiple ship types and patterns
Procedural meteor field with physics-based collisions
Object pooling for bullets and explosions — buttery 60fps
Power-ups: shields, multi-shot, speed boost and bombs
Particle FX for thrusters, explosions and weapon trails
Boss fights with multi-stage attack patterns
Score, combo system and persistent high-score table
